title: Archive of biochemical data sets contained in: Guanine-containing ssDNA and RNA induce dimeric and tetrameric SAMHD1 in cryo-EM and binding studies
author: Orris, Ben
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This archive contains all the biochemical data for the study "Guanine-containing ssDNA and RNA induce dimeric and tetrameric SAMHD1 in cryo-EM and binding studies". Further data supporting the structural data in this study is found in pdb and EMD accession numbers PDB ID 8TDV and EMD-41174 (RNA complex SAMHD1-T* cl ) and PDB ID 8TDW and EMD-41175 (RNA complex SAMHD1-T* op ). Further proteomics data is found in the Protein Exchange Database (PXD043587).

Further proteomics data is found in the Protein Exchange Database (PXD043587).
